steps.action: Switch to reviewer role, open 待审核, and continue task task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b / 测试提资单-1767928364
steps.expected: Reviewer workbench opens for the selected task
steps.observed: Workbench opened and loaded workflow data via GET /api/review/tasks/task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b/workflow

steps.expected: Timeline shows actor, time, action, and remarks for each entry
steps.observed: UI rendered two entries with action, timestamp, operator, and remarks: system submit on 2026/03/14 23:57 with remark 'try role sj', and user-002 submit on 2026/03/16 14:02 with remark 'validator submit check'

evidence.consoleErrors: Warning on app boot: Failed to load frontend version SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<', "<!DOCTYPE ..." is not valid JSON; no workflow-specific console errors observed.
evidence.network: GET /api/review/tasks/task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b/workflow -> success true, history entries rendered

assertions.title: 显示确认记录

steps.action: Open the same reviewer workbench and inspect 确认记录 section
steps.expected: Confirmed records list renders confirmation time, annotation count, and remarks if records exist
steps.observed: UI rendered '暂无确认记录' and backend returned an empty array from GET /api/review/records/by-task/task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b

evidence.consoleErrors: Warning on app boot: Failed to load frontend version SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<', "<!DOCTYPE ..." is not valid JSON; no confirmed-record specific console errors observed.

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing backend record data for the selected task, so list rendering with time/annotation-count/remarks could not be exercised. The empty-state itself rendered correctly.

steps.action: Open 提交到审核 dialog from the workbench
steps.expected: Submit dialog appears with remark input and confirm action
steps.observed: Dialog opened with 当前节点=校核, target action '提交到审核', optional remark input, and 确认提交 button

steps.action: Enter remark 'validator submit check' and confirm submit
steps.expected: Dialog closes, success feedback appears, and task status/context updates to the next node
steps.observed: POST /api/review/tasks/task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b/submit succeeded; dialog closed; workbench context updated from current node 校核 to 审核 and primary action changed from 提交到审核 to 提交到批准

steps.expected: Submitted task leaves the pending reviewer list or otherwise reflects updated context
steps.observed: 待审核 list became empty with '暂无审核任务', consistent with the task moving out of this reviewer queue

evidence.consoleErrors: Warning on app boot: Failed to load frontend version SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<', "<!DOCTYPE ..." is not valid JSON; no submit-flow specific page errors observed.
evidence.network: POST /api/review/tasks/task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b/submit observed in browser; subsequent GET /api/review/tasks?checker_id=user-002 refreshes removed the task from 待审核

assertions.title: 驳回操作成功

steps.action: Attempt to validate return flow after the submit mutation
steps.expected: A suitable task can be returned to design with a reason and show success feedback
steps.observed: No remaining pending reviewer task was available in the UI after submit, and direct backend validation attempt for the same task returned permission error: 权限不足：用户 debug-user 不是「审核」节点的负责人

evidence.consoleErrors: Warning on app boot: Failed to load frontend version SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<', "<!DOCTYPE ..." is not valid JSON; no return-dialog interaction completed.
evidence.network: No successful POST /api/review/tasks/{id}/return captured; direct POST /api/review/tasks/task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b/return with targetNode=sj returned success false / 权限不足

assertions.issues: Blocked because the only suitable inbox task was advanced to the next node during VAL-WORK-003, leaving no safe UI candidate for a return flow. A backend check also indicates role/session mismatch for return permission at the new node.

frictions.description: Headless browser session cannot initialize WebGL2, so the 3D Viewer pane always shows '3D Viewer 初始化失败'.
frictions.resolution: None; validation stayed focused on reviewer workbench panels outside the 3D surface.

frictions.description: The browser network log does not expose response status/body inline, so successful responses were inferred from UI state changes and supporting curl reads against the assigned backend.
frictions.resolution: Correlated UI updates with browser request capture and read-only curl calls to the local backend.

blockers.description: No second safe reviewer task was available to validate a successful return-to-design flow after the submit mutation, and direct backend return attempt failed permission check for the current node owner.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked 待审核 and 复审任务 tabs, queried GET /api/review/tasks?checker_id=user-002, and attempted POST /api/review/tasks/task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b/return with targetNode=sj; backend rejected with 权限不足。

blockers.description: Selected task had no confirmed records in backend data.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried GET /api/review/records/by-task/task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b and confirmed records array was empty.

summary: Tested 4 assertions for reviewer workbench actions using reviewer_001/user-002 on task task-af46d596-d792-40f8-976d-bc052fb3822b (测试提资单-1767928364): 2 passed (VAL-WORK-003, VAL-WORK-007) and 2 were blocked by missing data or unavailable/safely mutable task state (VAL-WORK-006, VAL-WORK-008). The task was advanced from current node sj/校核 to sh/审核 with submit remark 'validator submit check'.
